# docker-compose up -d && docker logs -f scribe_app_1 FROM ubuntu:jammy ARG DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive ENV TZ=Etc/UTC # APT RUN apt-get -qq update && apt-get install -qq \ make \ curl \ php \ php-curl \ php-xml \ php-sqlite3 \ php-bcmath \ php-curl \ php-gd \ php-imagick \ php-intl \ php-mbstring \ php-pdo \ php-zip \ php-soap \ php-pcov \ git \ p7zip-full # Composer Install RUN curl -sS https://getcomposer.org/installer | php && \ mv composer.phar /usr/local/bin/composer
